askPrompt: Dakhligayga heerka dhaqaale-la'aanta wuxuu yahay {breakEven} muddo kastaba. Dakhliga hadda: {revenue} ({pct}% heerka dhaqaale-la'aanta). Kharashaadka go'an: {fixed}, faa'iidada guud: {gm}%. Boggaalka badbaadada: {safety}%. Sideen u dhimi karaa heerka dhaqaale-la'aantayda?
rowFormula: Heerka Dhaqaale-la'aanta = Kharashaadka Go'an / Boggaalka Faa'iidada Guud%
ordersTitle: Dalabyada Loo Baahan Yahay si Heerka Dhaqaale-la'aanta loo gaaro
